name: lumen-lang
description: Syntax highlighting, indentation, autocomplete, hover, go-to-definition, references, rename, semantic highlighting, inlay type hints, compiler-backed diagnostics, and Run/Build for the Lumen programming language - powered by the Lumenlance language server.

scripts.test: node test/tokenize.js && node test/lang.test.js && node test/symbols.test.js && node test/diagnostics.test.js && node test/compiler.test.js && node test/indent.test.js

lumen.path.description: Path to the lumen executable. Leave as 'lumen' to auto-detect: the extension uses the per-user install at %LOCALAPPDATA%\Lumen\bin\lumen.exe if present, otherwise 'lumen' on your PATH. Set an absolute path to override (e.g. .../compiler/target/release/lumen.exe).

lumen.diagnostics.description: Show live errors from the Lumen compiler (`lumen check`): syntax errors, undefined names, bad methods, arity mismatches. Runs ~400ms after you stop typing and on save.

lumen.smartDedent.description: Experimental: after a return/break/continue/raise, dedent the next line by one level on Enter (requires editor.formatOnType, which this extension enables for Lumen by default).

lumen.lsp.enabled.description: Use the Lumenlance language server for richer intelligence (completion, hover with inferred types, references, rename, semantic highlighting, inlay hints, cross-file navigation). When disabled or the server binary is missing, the extension falls back to its in-process providers.

lumen.lsp.serverPath.description: Path to lumenlance(.exe). Environment variables are expanded (%VAR% on Windows, ${VAR}/$VAR elsewhere). Defaults to the per-user install at %LOCALAPPDATA%\Lumen\bin\lumenlance.exe; if that path doesn't exist, the extension falls back to the binary bundled with the extension (or a local Lumenlance build during development).
